creator: pirzyk@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 246687
Patch to update from version 0.04 to 0.05

Submitting a patch to update this perl module from version 0.04 to 0.05.  There is no functional change to the module on FreeBSD, the underlying change is to include a linux specific header file so it will compile there.  This is just to keep the perl module in sync.  I am the maintainter of this port and the perl cpan module.
